SEARCH
Package me.kevinboone.jgemini.base

Interface ClientCertManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultClientCertManager
public interface ClientCertManager
The interface that governs client certificate management.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addIdent(String name, KeystoreSpec keystoreSpec)
     
    String
    getIdentForURL(URL url)
    Returns some opaque identifier string for a URL.
    Set<String>
    getIdents()
    Returns the names of all the known identities.
    KeystoreSpec
    getKeystoreSpecForIdent(String ident)
    Gets the Keystore specification (keystore/password) for the specified ident, or null if there is not one.
    KeyManagerFactory
    getKMFForURL(URL url)
    Given the URL of a remote resource, return a configured KeyManagerFactory, that can be passed to SSLContext.init().
    void
    removeIdentForURL(URL url)
    Removes an ident for the specified url.
    void
    setIdentForURL(URL url, String ident)
    Sets the identity for a specific URL.
    void
    setNoneIdentForURL(URL url)
    Sets the identity for a specific URL to "none", so it does not even get the fallback identity.

  • Method Details

    • addIdent

      void addIdent(String name, KeystoreSpec keystoreSpec)

    • getKeystoreSpecForIdent

      KeystoreSpec getKeystoreSpecForIdent(String ident)
      Gets the Keystore specification (keystore/password) for the specified ident, or null if there is not one.

    • getKMFForURL

      KeyManagerFactory getKMFForURL(URL url) throws IOException
      Given the URL of a remote resource, return a configured KeyManagerFactory, that can be passed to SSLContext.init(). It's fine for the return value to be null, and it should be if the remote resource does not have an assigned client certificate. We'll throw an IOException if, for example, there is an assigned certificate but it can't be loaded.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • getIdentForURL

      String getIdentForURL(URL url)
      Returns some opaque identifier string for a URL. It could be a filename, perhaps, but it need not be.

    • getIdents

      Set<String> getIdents()
      Returns the names of all the known identities. Does not include "all" or "unassigned" -- just the real ones.

    • removeIdentForURL

      void removeIdentForURL(URL url)
      Removes an ident for the specified url.

    • setNoneIdentForURL

      void setNoneIdentForURL(URL url)
      Sets the identity for a specific URL to "none", so it does not even get the fallback identity.

    • setIdentForURL

      void setIdentForURL(URL url, String ident)
      Sets the identity for a specific URL.
